Rebate rate scheme changed by Alexander Jordain (commit 0b62451). The 3 prior rebate_report entries listed in params.superseded_rebate_report_ids were calculated at the OLD scheme and are superseded — the rebate for Apr+May 2026 will be re-run at the new scheme. Prior entries remain in the log unmodified for the audit trail; this entry documents the supersession.
Rebate cycle for April 2026 and May 2026

params.reason: Source file was a May-only export, not the full Mar-May quarter window Stage 3 requires. Each clinic's activity was undercounted by ~2/3 of its real quarter activity, producing inflated unused recapture invoices (35 rows, $150,027) and wholly missing the direct-bill overages for 14 clinics. Specific example: Abell Animal Hospital was billed $3,095 unused but actually had $278.29 overage.

entries.note: Superseded stage3_recapture entry 5d4af8e8 (JW, 2026-06-09T18:55:43). Removed 35 unused_invoice ledger rows so the corrected re-run (via OData live, default path) is not blocked by dedup. Operator (Tanya) voids the 35 corresponding QBO invoices manually.

Tanya confirmed the authoritative rate scheme in writing: ultrasound 10%/5% finance/self-funded; rads 8%/4% finance/self-funded. Earlier 2026-06-09 morning update (10/8 + 5/4, recorded in audit entry tied to commit 0b62451) was based on an incomplete verbal — the rads finance rate was 5% then, now correctly 8%; the ultrasound self-funded was 8% then, now correctly 5%.

params.reason: AJ rebate run for Apr+May 2026 (total $6,949.08) was calculated at the 2026-06-09 morning rate scheme (US 10% finance / 8% self-funded; Rads 5% finance / 4% self-funded). Tanya corrected the scheme in writing the same day to the authoritative values (US 10/5, Rads 8/4) — see audit entry c02d4967. AJ's run is therefore stale; the rebate for Apr+May 2026 will be re-run at the corrected rates.

entries.note: Superseded rebate_report entry b3d1e474 (AJ, 2026-06-09T22:43:48). Computed at rates that were corrected hours later by Tanya. The prior entry remains in the log unmodified.
